response.justification: While Bogdan is exceptionally skilled and technically exceeds all requirements, he is significantly overqualified for a junior/mid-level role. As a current Staff Engineer with 14+ years of experience, founder of open-source projects, and proven expertise in system design and clean architecture, this position would represent a step backward in his career progression. This creates high risk of rapid departure, misaligned salary expectations, and potential frustration with the role's scope and seniority level.
strengths: Exceptional technical mastery across entire stack—TypeScript, React, Node.js, databases, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes all proven at production scale
Deep commitment to software craftsmanship—demonstrates TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture, and mentoring through workshops and open-source contributions
14+ years hands-on development experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems shows adaptability and rapid learning of new tech stacks
concerns: Significantly overqualified—staff-level engineer applying for entry/mid-level role creates high retention risk and likely frustration with scope
Career trajectory shows consistent upward progression; this role would be a step backward and unlikely to hold interest long-term
Salary expectations for a staff engineer will substantially exceed budget allocation for a junior/mid-level fullstack developer position
